tasks.title: Structural tests for 6 council agent personas

tasks.title: Add persona to fbk-test-reviewer while preserving existing task logic
tasks.model_rationale: Prepending persona to a 171-line agent with existing checkpoint logic carries higher regression risk than bounded single-file rewrites; Sonnet avoids breaking existing sections
tasks.summary: Prepended persona section to assets/agents/fbk-test-reviewer.md activating "senior QA engineer with authority to block releases" with 3 output quality bars. Existing checkpoint logic and evaluation criteria preserved byte-for-byte. All 10 persona assertions pass. Note: pre-existing test tests/sdl-workflow/test-test-reviewer-agent.sh required regex update (authorized by user) to accept "evaluate" as a role-word synonym for "review".
